name: MAX17048 LiPo Fuel Gauge (1-cell)
description: Maxim MAX17048 1-cell Li-ion fuel gauge with ModelGauge, I2C 0x36 fixed, 2.5-4.5V, TDFN-8 2x2 (EP=GND). The battery-percentage chip on modern ESP32 dev boards.
dimensions_source: Maxim 19-6171 Rev7 + official outline 21-0168 RevM (TDFN 2x2, pitch 0.5, EP 0.8x1.2) + official land 90-0065 RevE (pads 0.30x0.70, rows 1.98 c-c vector-verified, EP land 0.8x1.38). Pinout p.6 (datasheet covers both MAX17048/MAX17049).
